934.reason: [逻辑错误：当flag为true且当前token不是分号时，才解析Exp，但这里条件写反了，应该是当flag为true且当前token不是分号时解析Exp，但实际意图是当flag为true（即分号在同一行）且当前不是分号时才解析Exp，但这里的条件判断有误，导致return语句后跟表达式时可能被错误跳过]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [逻辑错误：当flag为true且当前token不是分号时，才解析Exp，但这里条件写反了，应该是当flag为true且当前token不是分号时解析Exp，但实际意图是当flag为true（即分号在同一行）且当前不是分号时才解析Exp，但这里的条件判断有误，导致return语句后跟表达式时可能被错误跳过]

896.reason: [Missing handling for the case where the for loop's parentheses are not closed properly; if the for loop structure is incomplete (e.g., missing ';' or ')'), the parser may get stuck or skip error detection, leading to incorrect parsing or missing error reports.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing handling for the case where the for loop's parentheses are not closed properly; if the for loop structure is incomplete (e.g., missing ';' or ')'), the parser may get stuck or skip error detection, leading to incorrect parsing or missing error reports.]

1311.reason: [Missing bounds check for index, causes IndexOutOfBoundsException when index >= tokens.size()]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing bounds check for index, causes IndexOutOfBoundsException when index >= tokens.size()]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Directly accessing tokens.get(index) without verifying if index < tokens.size() will throw IndexOutOfBoundsException when the parser looks ahead past the end of the token list.]

215.reason: [Error: The loop condition checks 'ch' which holds the character from the previous iteration. It should check the character at the current position or update 'ch' at the start of the loop, leading to incorrect token boundaries or infinite loops.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition checks 'ch' which holds the character from the previous iteration. It should check the character at the current position or update 'ch' at the start of the loop, leading to incorrect token boundaries or infinite loops.]

1322.reason: [Error: Accessing tokens.get(index) without bounds checking (index < tokens.size()) will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Additionally, the loop lacks a termination condition for the end of the list, risking an infinite loop or crash.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Accessing tokens.get(index) without bounds checking (index < tokens.size()) will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Additionally, the loop lacks a termination condition for the end of the list, risking an infinite loop or crash.]

429.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking currentIndex+2 assumes there are at least 3 tokens ahead, but doesn't verify currentIndex+1 is valid first. Also, function definitions should be determined by seeing '(' after identifier, not by fixed offset.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking currentIndex+2 assumes there are at least 3 tokens ahead, but doesn't verify currentIndex+1 is valid first. Also, function definitions should be determined by seeing '(' after identifier, not by fixed offset.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking currentIndex+2 assumes the token after next is LPARENT, but doesn't verify the intermediate token is an identifier. This can misclassify variable declarations as function definitions.]
